name: Lulu's Farm Roadside Market

Products.value: Fresh produce (peaches, sweet corn, chiles, tomatoes, vegetables, fruit, herbs), roasted green chile, naturally raised beef, frozen chili and spice blends, smokers/grills, propane, outdoor furniture and storage

notes: On-file website (lulusfarm.com) is live and legitimate (official site for Lulu's Farm/The Chili Guys, same operator, cert covers lulusfarm.com). On-file Facebook URL redirects to https://www.facebook.com/Lulusfarm/ (lowercase 'f'), used that canonical form. Note this is a year-round farm/roadside market and retail store rather than a seasonal vendor-based farmers market, so 'Months Open' isn't really applicable (site indicates open 7 days/week year-round, but did not find an explicit seasonal closure statement so omitted 'Months Open'). SNAP/EBT, Instagram, ADA accessibility, and Certified Organic status were not stated on the official site; third-party aggregators (Yelp, chamberofcommerce.com, Feed America SNAP list) suggest SNAP acceptance and slightly different weekend hours (Mon-Sat 9-6, Sun 9-5), but these were not used since they are not official sources and instructions call for official-source-only, clearly-stated facts. Address on file (13201 E 144th Ave, Brighton, CO 80601) matches the official site exactly, so not changed.
